description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure dressed in urban attire, featuring a fitted short-sleeve shirt with a tie and suspenders, paired with cargo pants and rugged boots. The figure wears fingerless gloves and an armband, adding a sporty and practical touch to the outfit. The person has a side ponytail hairstyle, and a pair of glasses is visible on the face. The clothing is detailed with accessories such as a wristband and visible seams on the pants. The overall build is athletic, with a confident, upright posture. The figure's attire and accessories suggest readiness for active movement in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in urban clothing with a tie, suspenders, cargo pants, boots, and fingerless gloves, standing upright with a side ponytail and glasses.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the suspenders, back of the shirt, ponytail, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm accessories, and the layered pants.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the tie, suspenders, glasses, gloves, and confident stance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side ponytail, arm details, and boot profile.
attribute_clothing_type: casual shirt with tie and suspenders, cargo pants, fingerless gloves, and wristband
